TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Cung-kuo-zen-min-kung-he-kuo: Si-cin-pin == ci Si-cin-pin " caysiwlimlu mihca nem bulad caylim demiad", pilecuhan i San-si-hu-pin, aenengan i He-nan-teng-cuo, pilecuhan i Pei-cin, Cung-kuo-kun-cen-ten, Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo a cen-ce tademaw, sakakaay nu mililiday tu kanatal. tusepcaytu mihca caycay bulad katukuh ayda u Cung-kun-cung-yeng sakakaay atu Cung-kun-cung-yeng hitay nu sakakaay, u Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo atu Kuo-ten, cen, hitay namaka tusepcaytu mihcaan katukuh ayda sakalalima nu satalakaway a mililiday tu tademawan. ÁŅíŤŅĎŚĻ≥(1953ŚĻī6śúą15śó•‚ÄĒ), . ci Si-cin-pin itida i Pei-ci balaki, u Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo pitadasan nu kanatal ci Si-cung-sen atu sakatusa a acawaan ci Ci-sin tu sakakaay, u sayaway nu pilecuhan itida i Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo tu nipalekalan nu Cung-ku sakakaay nu mililiday tu tademawan. . kaydaan maudip ÁĒüŚĻ≥ nikaudipan yu wawa henay śó©ŚĻīÁ∂ďś≠∑ caysiwlimlu mihca enem bulad caylim demiad, pilecuhan ni Si-cin-pin i Pei-cin. tawya ci ama nida ci Si-cung-cen u sakakaay tu nu Cung-kun-cung-yeng sien-cun-pu' sakakaay atu cen-w'-yeng wen-hua-ciaw-yi wi-yen-huy hu-cu-zen. naytidadtu i mulaay nu wawa mueneng mabi tu picudadan nu Pei-hay mulaay, pilisinan sa a taluma'. 1953ŚĻī6śúą15śó•, . caysiwnemsep mihca, micuda tu Pei-cin-se-pa cacudadan, malecad tu a milabin tiya cacudadan. saan, u nuheni malekaka atu sab ayu taluma' satu kanca makabasu a taluma', ci ama nida caay henay piala padungus i tu nuhenian. 1960ŚĻī, . caysiwnemtu mihca, ci ama nida tawya u Kuo-w'-yen hu-cung-li malami-su sikawaw tu "mihantayay tu cudad "Liw-ce-tan" nu kawawan" sa mapaales nu kakulian, pulule tayda i Pei-cin-wi-su'-ci. tawya mamin edisan wadwaden ku lalabu nu luma', sisa kilul sat utu ina mabulaw taydan i Cung-yeng-tan-siaw. caysiwnemlim mihcaan itida i Pei-cin-se-pa nu wawaan a mihedek tu nipicudadan, tawya tu siwaay a buladan micudad tu cu-cung. 1962ŚĻī, . duma satu a kamuan tu ci Si-cin-pin naytida i Pei-ci 101 micudad tu siningan a cacudadan, itawya, maadih nutaw ku nipicidek nida tu namuh tu pitukudan tu malian. saan ku saba ci Si-yen-pin sakamusa, caysiwnemwal mihcaan mapalalid nu kawaw ni ama nida, kina pina a liclican atu pullulan a miliclic, tahekal satu, mahicaay tu kiya ku udip, nai' tu ku keng, tanukutu sa ku udipudipan, kilul sa tayda nida tayda i caleinaan pahanhan misakapah tu udip, tadakapah tu ku nipidiput nu caleinaan hamaw sa a kapah ku udip. . picudadan tu tabakiay a cacudadan Ś§ßŚ≠łśôāśúü caysiwpiclim mica, nika tabuyuan atu nikatasasaan tu pituay nu mihcaan, makayda ci Si-cin-pin nu Kun-nung-pin micudad tu sapicuduhan, micumud i Cin-hua-ta-sye hua-kun-si cacudadan a minanam. caysep bulad pic demiad, niyaduay a tademaw padungs ci Si-cin-pinan miliyas tu Liang-cia-he, malalum ci Si-cin-pin i tawya talusa. 1975ŚĻī, . picudadan tu tabakiay nu cacudadan, makaadih ci nida tu sakalaledian tu cabayan ci Cen-si, sulecad sa ku kawaw atu mihcaan nu heni manamuh aca tu sakay laylay nu kawawan, sisa kapah sa ku nikalecabayan nu heni, yu micudad henay ci Si-cin-pin tu Cin-hua-ta-sye malatang nu su-ci ci Cen-si a tatusa ku misiwkayay ci nidaan. katukuh tu pinaay a mihcaan malasakakaay tu ci Si-cin-pin, ci Cen-si hantu malasakakaay tu nu Cung-yeng-cu-ce-pu sakakaay. .
S.PHON: == ¶uŇč-kuo-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo: si- ¶in-pin == ¶i si- ¶in-pin " ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimr~…ĺu mińß ¶a n…ôm bur~…ĺad ¶ajr~…ĺim d…ômiad", pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i san-si-ńßu-pin, a…ôn…ôŇčan i ńß…ô-nan-t…ôŇč- ¶uo, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i p…ôi- ¶in, ¶uŇč-kuo-kun- ¶…ôn-t…ôn, ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô tad…ômaw, sakakaaj nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj tu kanatar~…ĺ. tus…ôp ¶ajtu mińß ¶a ¶aj ¶aj bur~…ĺad katukuńß ajda u ¶uŇč-kun- ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč sakakaaj atu ¶uŇč-kun- ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč ńßitaj nu sakakaaj, u ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo atu kuo-t…ôn, ¶…ôn, ńßitaj namaka tus…ôp ¶ajtu mińß ¶aan katukuńß ajda sakar~…ĺar~…ĺima nu satar~…ĺakawaj a mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj tu tad…ômawan. ***(***********), . ¶i si- ¶in-pin itida i p…ôi- ¶i bar~…ĺaki, u ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo pitadasan nu kanatar~…ĺ ¶i si- ¶uŇč-s…ôn atu sakatusa a a ¶awaan ¶i ¶i-sin tu sakakaaj, u sajawaj nu pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan itida i ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo tu nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu ¶uŇč-ku sakakaaj nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj tu tad…ômawan. . kajdaan maudip ** nikaudipan ju wawa ńß…ônaj **** ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimr~…ĺu mińß ¶a …ôn…ôm bur~…ĺad ¶ajr~…ĺim d…ômiad, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ni si- ¶in-pin i p…ôi- ¶in. tawja ¶i ama nida ¶i si- ¶uŇč- ¶…ôn u sakakaaj tu nu ¶uŇč-kun- ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč si…ôn- ¶un-pu Ē~ ° sakakaaj atu ¶…ôn-w Ē~ °-j…ôŇč w…ôn-ńßua- ¶iaw-ji wi-j…ôn-ńßuj ńßu- ¶u-z…ôn. najtidadtu i mur~…ĺaaj nu wawa mu…ôn…ôŇč mabi tu pi ¶udadan nu p…ôi-ńßaj mur~…ĺaaj, pir~…ĺisinan sa a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. **********, . ¶ajsiwn…ôms…ôp mińß ¶a, mi ¶uda tu p…ôi- ¶in-s…ô-pa ¶a ¶udadan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu a mir~…ĺabin tija ¶a ¶udadan. saan, u nuńß…ôni mar~…ĺ…ôkaka atu sab aju tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° satu kan ¶a makabasu a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ¶i ama nida ¶aaj ńß…ônaj piar~…ĺa paduŇčus i tu nuńß…ônian. *****, . ¶ajsiwn…ômtu mińß ¶a, ¶i ama nida tawja u kuo-w Ē~ °-j…ôn ńßu- ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺami-su sikawaw tu "mińßantajaj tu ¶udad "r~…ĺiw- ¶…ô-tan" nu kawawan" sa mapaar~…ĺ…ôs nu kakur~…ĺian, pur~…ĺur~…ĺ…ô tajda i p…ôi- ¶in-wi-su Ē~ °- ¶i. tawja mamin …ôdisan wadwad…ôn ku r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sisa kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sat utu ina mabur~…ĺaw tajdan i ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč-tan-siaw. ¶ajsiwn…ômr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan itida i p…ôi- ¶in-s…ô-pa nu wawaan a mińß…ôd…ôk tu nipi ¶udadan, tawja tu siwaaj a bur~…ĺadan mi ¶udad tu ¶u- ¶uŇč. *****, . duma satu a kamuan tu ¶i si- ¶in-pin najtida i p…ôi- ¶i *** mi ¶udad tu siniŇčan a ¶a ¶udadan, itawja, maadińß nutaw ku nipi ¶id…ôk nida tu namuńß tu pitukudan tu mar~…ĺian. saan ku saba ¶i si-j…ôn-pin sakamusa, ¶ajsiwn…ômwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu kawaw ni ama nida, kina pina a r~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶an atu pur~…ĺr~…ĺur~…ĺan a mir~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ satu, mańßi ¶aaj tu kija ku udip, nai Ē~ ° tu ku k…ôŇč, tanukutu sa ku udipudipan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa tajda nida tajda i ¶ar~…ĺ…ôinaan pańßanńßan misakapańß tu udip, tadakapańß tu ku nipidiput nu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôinaan ńßamaw sa a kapańß ku udip. . pi ¶udadan tu tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan **** ¶ajsiwpi ¶r~…ĺim mi ¶a, nika tabujuan atu nikatasasaan tu pituaj nu mińß ¶aan, makajda ¶i si- ¶in-pin nu kun-nuŇč-pin mi ¶udad tu sapi ¶uduńßan, mi ¶umud i ¶in-ńßua-ta-sj…ô ńßua-kun-si ¶a ¶udadan a minanam. ¶ajs…ôp bur~…ĺad pi ¶ d…ômiad, nijaduaj a tad…ômaw paduŇčs ¶i si- ¶in-pinan mir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺiaŇč- ¶ia-ńß…ô, mar~…ĺar~…ĺum ¶i si- ¶in-pin i tawja tar~…ĺusa. *****, . pi ¶udadan tu tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan, makaadińß ¶i nida tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdian tu ¶abajan ¶i ¶…ôn-si, sur~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sa ku kawaw atu mińß ¶aan nu ńß…ôni manamuńß a ¶a tu sakaj r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu kawawan, sisa kapańß sa ku nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan nu ńß…ôni, ju mi ¶udad ńß…ônaj ¶i si- ¶in-pin tu ¶in-ńßua-ta-sj…ô mar~…ĺataŇč nu su- ¶i ¶i ¶…ôn-si a tatusa ku misiwkajaj ¶i nidaan. katukuńß tu pinaaj a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺasakakaaj tu ¶i si- ¶in-pin, ¶i ¶…ôn-si ńßantu mar~…ĺasakakaaj tu nu ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč- ¶u- ¶…ô-pu sakakaaj. .
S.FORM: == Cung-kuo-zen-min-kung-he-kuo: Si-cin-pin == ci Si-cin-pin " caysiwlimlu mihca nem bulad caylim demiad", pilecuhan i San-si-hu-pin, aenengan i He-nan-teng-cuo, pilecuhan i Pei-cin, Cung-kuo-kun-cen-ten, Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo a cen-ce tademaw, sakakaay nu mililiday tu kanatal. tusepcaytu mihca caycay bulad katukuh ayda u Cung-kun-cung-yeng sakakaay atu Cung-kun-cung-yeng hitay nu sakakaay, u Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo atu Kuo-ten, cen, hitay namaka tusepcaytu mihcaan katukuh ayda sakalalima nu satalakaway a mililiday tu tademawan. ÁŅíŤŅĎŚĻ≥(1953ŚĻī6śúą15śó•‚ÄĒ), . ci Si-cin-pin itida i Pei-ci balaki, u Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo pitadasan nu kanatal ci Si-cung-sen atu sakatusa a acawaan ci Ci-sin tu sakakaay, u sayaway nu pilecuhan itida i Cung-hua-zen-min-kun-he-kuo tu nipalekalan nu Cung-ku sakakaay nu mililiday tu tademawan. . kaydaan maudip ÁĒüŚĻ≥ nikaudipan yu wawa henay śó©ŚĻīÁ∂ďś≠∑ caysiwlimlu mihca enem bulad caylim demiad, pilecuhan ni Si-cin-pin i Pei-cin. tawya ci ama nida ci Si-cung-cen u sakakaay tu nu Cung-kun-cung-yeng sien-cun-pu' sakakaay atu cen-w'-yeng wen-hua-ciaw-yi wi-yen-huy hu-cu-zen. naytidadtu i mulaay nu wawa mueneng mabi tu picudadan nu Pei-hay mulaay, pilisinan sa a taluma'. 1953ŚĻī6śúą15śó•, . caysiwnemsep mihca, micuda tu Pei-cin-se-pa cacudadan, malecad tu a milabin tiya cacudadan. saan, u nuheni malekaka atu sab ayu taluma' satu kanca makabasu a taluma', ci ama nida caay henay piala padungus i tu nuhenian. 1960ŚĻī, . caysiwnemtu mihca, ci ama nida tawya u Kuo-w'-yen hu-cung-li malami-su sikawaw tu "mihantayay tu cudad "Liw-ce-tan" nu kawawan" sa mapaales nu kakulian, pulule tayda i Pei-cin-wi-su'-ci. tawya mamin edisan wadwaden ku lalabu nu luma', sisa kilul sat utu ina mabulaw taydan i Cung-yeng-tan-siaw. caysiwnemlim mihcaan itida i Pei-cin-se-pa nu wawaan a mihedek tu nipicudadan, tawya tu siwaay a buladan micudad tu cu-cung. 1962ŚĻī, . duma satu a kamuan tu ci Si-cin-pin naytida i Pei-ci 101 micudad tu siningan a cacudadan, itawya, maadih nutaw ku nipicidek nida tu namuh tu pitukudan tu malian. saan ku saba ci Si-yen-pin sakamusa, caysiwnemwal mihcaan mapalalid nu kawaw ni ama nida, kina pina a liclican atu pullulan a miliclic, tahekal satu, mahicaay tu kiya ku udip, nai' tu ku keng, tanukutu sa ku udipudipan, kilul sa tayda nida tayda i caleinaan pahanhan misakapah tu udip, tadakapah tu ku nipidiput nu caleinaan hamaw sa a kapah ku udip. . picudadan tu tabakiay a cacudadan Ś§ßŚ≠łśôāśúü caysiwpiclim mica, nika tabuyuan atu nikatasasaan tu pituay nu mihcaan, makayda ci Si-cin-pin nu Kun-nung-pin micudad tu sapicuduhan, micumud i Cin-hua-ta-sye hua-kun-si cacudadan a minanam. caysep bulad pic demiad, niyaduay a tademaw padungs ci Si-cin-pinan miliyas tu Liang-cia-he, malalum ci Si-cin-pin i tawya talusa. 1975ŚĻī, . picudadan tu tabakiay nu cacudadan, makaadih ci nida tu sakalaledian tu cabayan ci Cen-si, sulecad sa ku kawaw atu mihcaan nu heni manamuh aca tu sakay laylay nu kawawan, sisa kapah sa ku nikalecabayan nu heni, yu micudad henay ci Si-cin-pin tu Cin-hua-ta-sye malatang nu su-ci ci Cen-si a tatusa ku misiwkayay ci nidaan. katukuh tu pinaay a mihcaan malasakakaay tu ci Si-cin-pin, ci Cen-si hantu malasakakaay tu nu Cung-yeng-cu-ce-pu sakakaay. .
S.PHON: == ¶uŇč-kuo-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo: si- ¶in-pin == ¶i si- ¶in-pin " ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimr~…ĺu mińß ¶a n…ôm bur~…ĺad ¶ajr~…ĺim d…ômiad", pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i san-si-ńßu-pin, a…ôn…ôŇčan i ńß…ô-nan-t…ôŇč- ¶uo, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i p…ôi- ¶in, ¶uŇč-kuo-kun- ¶…ôn-t…ôn, ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô tad…ômaw, sakakaaj nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj tu kanatar~…ĺ. tus…ôp ¶ajtu mińß ¶a ¶aj ¶aj bur~…ĺad katukuńß ajda u ¶uŇč-kun- ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč sakakaaj atu ¶uŇč-kun- ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč ńßitaj nu sakakaaj, u ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo atu kuo-t…ôn, ¶…ôn, ńßitaj namaka tus…ôp ¶ajtu mińß ¶aan katukuńß ajda sakar~…ĺar~…ĺima nu satar~…ĺakawaj a mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj tu tad…ômawan. ***(***********), . ¶i si- ¶in-pin itida i p…ôi- ¶i bar~…ĺaki, u ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo pitadasan nu kanatar~…ĺ ¶i si- ¶uŇč-s…ôn atu sakatusa a a ¶awaan ¶i ¶i-sin tu sakakaaj, u sajawaj nu pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan itida i ¶uŇč-ńßua-z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo tu nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu ¶uŇč-ku sakakaaj nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj tu ¶…ôn u sakakaaj tu nu ¶uŇč-kun- ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč si…ôn- ¶un-pu Ē~ ° sakakaaj atu ¶…ôn-w Ē~ °-j…ôŇč w…ôn-ńßua- ¶iaw-ji wi-j…ôn-ńßuj ńßu- ¶u-z…ôn. najtidadtu i mur~…ĺaaj nu wawa mu…ôn…ôŇč mabi tu pi ¶udadan nu p…ôi-ńßaj mur~…ĺaaj, pir~…ĺisinan sa a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °. **********, . ¶ajsiwn…ôms…ôp mińß ¶a, mi ¶uda tu p…ôi- ¶in-s…ô-pa ¶a ¶udadan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu a mir~…ĺabin tija ¶a ¶udadan. saan, u nuńß…ôni mar~…ĺ…ôkaka atu sab aju tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° satu kan ¶a makabasu a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ¶i ama nida ¶aaj ńß…ônaj piar~…ĺa paduŇčus i tu nuńß…ônian. *****, . ¶ajsiwn…ômtu mińß ¶a, ¶i ama nida tawja u kuo-w Ē~ °-j…ôn ńßu- ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺami-su sikawaw tu "mińßantajaj tu ¶udad "r~…ĺiw- ¶…ô-tan" nu kawawan" sa mapaar~…ĺ…ôs nu kakur~…ĺian, pur~…ĺur~…ĺ…ô tajda i p…ôi- ¶in-wi-su Ē~ °- ¶i. tawja mamin …ôdisan ¶udadan, tawja tu siwaaj a bur~…ĺadan mi ¶udad tu ¶u- ¶uŇč. *****, . duma satu a kamuan tu ¶i si- ¶in-pin najtida i p…ôi- ¶i *** mi ¶udad tu siniŇčan a ¶a ¶udadan, itawja, maadińß nutaw ku nipi ¶id…ôk nida tu namuńß tu pitukudan tu mar~…ĺian. saan ku saba ¶i si-j…ôn-pin sakamusa, ¶ajsiwn…ômwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan mapar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu kawaw ni ama nida, kina pina a r~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶an atu pur~…ĺr~…ĺur~…ĺan a mir~…ĺi ¶r~…ĺi ¶, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ satu, mańßi ¶aaj tu kija ku udip, nai Ē~ ° tu ku k…ôŇč, tanukutu sa ku udipudipan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa tajda nida tajda i ¶ar~…ĺ…ôinaan pańßanńßan misakapańß tu udip, tadakapańß tu ku nipidiput nu ¶ar~…ĺ…ôinaan ńßamaw sa a kapańß ku udip. . pi ¶udadan tu tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan **** ¶ajsiwpi ¶r~…ĺim mi ¶a, nika tabujuan atu nikatasasaan tu pituaj nu mińß ¶aan, makajda ¶i si- ¶in-pin nu kun-nuŇč-pin mi ¶udad tu sapi ¶uduńßan, mi ¶umud i ¶in-ńßua-ta-sj…ô ńßua-kun-si ¶a ¶udadan a minanam. ¶ajs…ôp bur~…ĺad pi ¶ d…ômiad, nijaduaj a tad…ômaw paduŇčs ¶i si- ¶in-pinan mir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺiaŇč- ¶ia-ńß…ô, mar~…ĺar~…ĺum ¶i si- ¶in-pin i tawja tar~…ĺusa. *****, . pi ¶udadan tu tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan, makaadińß ¶i nida tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôdian tu ¶abajan ¶i ¶…ôn-si, sur~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sa ku kawaw atu mińß ¶aan nu ńß…ôni manamuńß a ¶a tu sakaj r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj nu kawawan, sisa kapańß sa ku nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan nu ńß…ôni, ju mi ¶udad ńß…ônaj ¶i si- ¶in-pin tu ¶in-ńßua-ta-sj…ô mar~…ĺataŇč nu su- ¶i ¶i ¶…ôn-si a tatusa ku misiwkajaj ¶i nidaan. katukuńß tu pinaaj a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺasakakaaj tu ¶i si- ¶in-pin, ¶i ¶…ôn-si ńßantu mar~…ĺasakakaaj tu nu ¶uŇč-j…ôŇč- ¶u- ¶…ô-pu sakakaaj. .
